subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-12-05 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: After the end of three years, again I return to the Holy Land. Were it not for the assistance and protection
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
